title: net/http Transport Ownership, Redirects, Bodies, and Timeouts · Go Semantics Case: Bounded Body Read

For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Bounded Body Read model · Theory Bounded Body Read, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: io.LimitReader alone tells callers when a body exceeded the limit.
